fields.description: The bare subdomain label, unique across the fleet. The site is reachable at <subdomain>.<region domain>. This is the routing key the proxy stores in its live map.
fields.label: Subdomain

fields.description: Inactive subdomains are excluded from the desired map the proxy serves (the row stays for history). Toggle off to take a site off the front door without deleting the mapping.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Set when the provisioner (an Atlas Site/Pilot) recorded this route as deploy intent, so Satellite reconciles it off the VM's routing_subdomains. Clear for a guest self-serve route (bench-domain-provider), which the intent reconcile never touches.
fields.label: Provisioner Intent

fields.description: The site VM this subdomain points at. The proxy dials its guest IPv6 :80 (plaintext) over the v6 internet.
fields.label: Virtual Machine

fields.description: The target VM's routing IPv6 /128, denormalized so the desired map is a single query with no join. Kept in sync with the mirror's guest_ipv6 (or private_address for a dark VM) on save.
fields.label: Address
